headline: Dow stock jumps 4.5% on JPMorgan upgrade amid oil surge
summary: Investing.com -- Dow Inc. (NYSE:DOW) shares rose 4.5% Friday following an upgrade to overweight from JPMorgan, which raised its price target to $40 from $26. The move marked the third upgrade for the chemical maker this week, after similar actions from BMO and KeyBanc.
